meta.title: ARUS UI Usefulness & Density Audit
meta.scopeNotes: ~89 page files in client/src/pages, ~60 backend domains in server/domains, hub-based navigation, role/permission surface.

classLegend.G: Dead / unlinked or backend-only with no UI

scoringFramework.note: Score is the clamped 0-100 sum of factor contributions; values below are the auditor's calibrated estimates.

meta.statusCurrent: Living document. Generated as analysis-only input; the implementation phases it fed (Phase 1 trust-fixes, Phase 1.5 blocker-closure) have since shipped production changes. brokenActions[] preserves the ORIGINAL findings for traceability; highRiskButtonAudit records the verified post-implementation state and supersedes any conflicting brokenActions row. Where they disagree, highRiskButtonAudit is authoritative.
meta.inventoryGranularity: Route/tab-level (every page, tab, route). High-risk individual buttons/mutations are catalogued in brokenActions[] and highRiskButtonAudit; not an exhaustive per-pixel widget catalogue.

items.name: Safety Bulletins
items.roleVisibility: list open to all auth; create = requireSafetyBulletinWriteRole
items.permissionRec: confirm list gating vs UI implication

items.name: PdM Dashboard
items.description: Fleet-wide predictive health summary; overlaps equipment-intelligence.

items.name: PdM Platform
items.permissionRec: becomes PdM front door; reduce tabs

items.name: Equipment Detail Hub
items.description: Single equipment status/history; contains dead Acknowledge/Assign buttons.

items.name: Crew Scheduler
items.description: Roster/watch rotation; premature PDF-export toast in panel.

items.name: Logistics Hub
items.description: Inventory/supply hub; cost shows $— when aggregation null.

items.name: Inventory Management
items.description: Stock/warehouse tracking. Canonical inventory surface — KEEP, surfaced as the primary tab of the Logistics hub.

items.name: Analytics Hub
items.description: Analytics landing; re-renders sub-page KPIs; key-findings fallback masks errors.

items.name: AI Health Dashboard
items.description: AI model health; hardcoded Models Active=3 and Last Training=7 days ago.
items.permissionRec: bind real metrics; merge into AI/Models tab

items.name: System Hub
items.description: Admin landing; overview cards overlap system-administration.

items.name: System Administration
items.description: Low-level platform settings (12+ tabs); Publish Update path env-dependent.

items.name: Feedback
items.description: User feedback (one of two normal-user pages).

items.name: Sensor Optimization (embedded tab)
items.description: Lazily imported and rendered as a tab inside sensors-hub.tsx; not a standalone route, not an orphan.

items.description: Lazily imported and rendered as a tab inside sensors-hub.tsx; not a standalone route, not an orphan.

brokenActions.currentState: No longer dead — now wired to a real mutation and covered by tests/playwright/journeys/equipment-hub-actions.spec.ts. The 'dead button' finding was an intermediate snapshot.
No longer dead — now wired to a real mutation and covered by tests/playwright/journeys/equipment-hub-actions.spec.ts. The 'dead button' finding was an intermediate snapshot.

brokenActions.recommendation: FIX-FIRST: bind to real model count

brokenActions.issue: 'All systems operating within normal parameters' shown when data missing/failed — masks errors.

brokenActions.recommendation: FIX-FIRST: surface 'not available' vs zero; verify backend aggregation

brokenActions.issue: Submission path relies on Replit-env assumptions; may not trigger real side-effects in prod.
brokenActions.recommendation: Verify end-to-end or gate with dev-only notice

brokenActions.issue: Toast fires before stream verified non-empty.
Success shown on mutation trigger in some legacy paths without persistence confirmation.

backendOnlyDomains.decision: KEEP backend-only — every route is gated by requireOrgId (authenticated + org-scoped), so it is not an open API gap. Niche OSV/DP feature consumed via API/integrations; no UI planned now. Defer UI build to product.
KEEP backend-only — every route gated by requireOrgId. Niche charter-KPI feature; API/integration consumer only; defer UI to product.
KEEP backend-only — every route gated by requireOrgId. OVID/SIRE vetting feature; API/integration consumer only; defer UI to product.
KEEP backend-only — every route gated by requireOrgId. Offshore-ops logging feature; API/integration consumer only; defer UI to product.
KEEP backend-only — every route gated by requireOrgId. EFMS integration feature; system-to-system/API consumer only; defer UI to product.

backendOnlyDomains.recommendation: Surface in System Admin Advanced or document internal
backendOnlyDomains.decision: KEEP backend-only — already hardened with requireAdminAuth + auditAdminAction. Documented internal/admin API; no broad UI needed.

gatingMismatches.frontend: create-only gating; list visible to all authenticated
gatingMismatches.backend: list open to all authenticated; create = requireSafetyBulletinWriteRole
gatingMismatches.verdict: CONFIRMED INTENTIONAL — deliberate read-all + write-gated model so safety notices reach all crew; documented inline on the GET route; no UI/API mismatch

gatingMismatches.frontend: PermissionGate / hub gate on predictive_maintenance resource
gatingMismatches.backend: lifecycle mutations now use requirePermission(predictive_maintenance, manage_config)
gatingMismatches.verdict: RESOLVED — backend converted from requireRole(admin,chief_engineer) to permission-grant; admin/super_admin templates updated to retain manage_config; both sides now gate on the predictive_maintenance resource

highRiskButtonAudit.title: High-Risk Button and Mutation Action Audit (Phase 1.5)
highRiskButtonAudit.method: Static source inspection (button -> handler -> mutation -> backend route -> toast). Browser/runtime execution not possible in sandbox; runtime tier authored as tests/playwright/persona-nav.spec.ts + journeys/equipment-hub-actions.spec.ts.

truthLegend.OK: Success fires only on real success; failure surfaces an error.
truthLegend.SILENT-EDGE: No false-positive, but an empty/failure path is silent.
truthLegend.FALSE-SUCCESS: Can show success when the action did not succeed.

controls.note: Earlier 'dead button removed' report was an intermediate state; current tree has the wired+tested version.
Operates on real WO + crew data; invalidates /api/work-orders on success.

controls.recommendation: FIX-FIRST (implement backend) or HIDE until built
controls.note: Form fully rendered (~L526-708) incl Preview; neither backend route exists in server/domains/software-updates/routes.ts -> every submit 404s -> error toast (no false success). Missing feature, documented not rebuilt.
Returns false on empty/catch, true on save; caller toasts only if(success) -> no false-positive. Empty/failure path is silent but near-unreachable (button hidden when no assignments).
Toast-on-settled concern unfounded; success only in onSuccess, failure in onError. Backend gated requireSuperAdminRole; frontend super-admin gated to match.

summary.rationale: Two controls real+tested, two correct (no false success), one missing-backend feature out of scope to build here. All findings documented; no UI code changed.
